army_customisation.intro:
Army Customisation allows you to further individualise your force. Archetypes change how you build your army by moving around units in the Army Organisation Plan (AOP) or letting you take more of a unit than you would normally be allowed to. Legacies give access to armories and disciplines of legendary factions. Traits enhance your units with special abilities that they normally would not be able to have.

You may select up to the following:
0-1 Archetype, 0-1 Legacy

archetypes.name: Flying Death
archetypes.description:
- Gargoyle Broods & Tyranid Warrior Broods with the "Winged" Biomorph can be taken as Troops.
- Only Gargoyle Broods & Tyranid Warrior Broods with the "Winged" Biomorph count towards the 25% Troops limitation.
- At least half of all Gargoyle Brood & Tyranid Warrior Broods with the "Winged" Biomorph must start the game in reserves, even if the mission does not allow reserves.

archetypes.name: Megafauna
archetypes.description:
- Carnifex Broods can be taken as Troops.
- Only Carnifex Broods count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Tyrannocyte Assault
archetypes.description:
- All units must start the game as passengers inside a Tyrannocyte.
- Half of all Tyrannocyte in the army (round up) arrive automatically in the first battle round as reinforcements. The other half arrives automatically in the second battle round.

legacies.name: Adaptive Toxins
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Gorgon in the Hive Armory.

legacies.name: Bio-Barrage
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Kronos in the Hive Armory.

legacies.name: Hyper-Aggression
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Behemoth in the Hive Armory.

legacies.name: Questing Tendrils
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Kraken in the Hive Armory.

legacies.name: Synaptic Control
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Leviathan in the Hive Armory.
